title: Aleuritia melanodonta
taxonomy: Aleuritia melanodonta is a species of spider, and as such, it belongs to the class Arachnida. This class is further divided into several orders, with Aleuritia melanodonta being a member of the order Araneomorphae. The order Araneomorphae is a group of spiders that includes over 48,000 described species. Aleuritia melanodonta is specifically a member of the family Salticidae, commonly known as jumping spiders. This classification places Aleuritia melanodonta within the larger arachnid family tree.
